vulnerability.reason: Both describe the sensitivity as leaked architecture information (KV cache size vs. architecture details) due to timing side-channels with lacking protections, enabling attacks.
vulnerability.reference: Leaked architecture details allow attackers to optimize membership inference attacks against the API.
